subcodes.first_line: O Thou the Most Glorious, I lay my brow upon the sacred Threshold, beseeching aid and confirmation for the Assembly [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی الابهی انی اضع جبینی علی العتبه الطاهره و ارجو النصره و التایید لمحفل
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for gatherings; meetings; assemblies, @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @permission for visit; pilgrimage
